articles.title: This first grade teacher is running the Boston Marathon to support her students
articles.description:
Siobhan Salani is running for the Corey C. Griffin Foundation, which has had a direct impact on her students.

summary: Siobhan Salani, a first grade teacher, is running the Boston Marathon.

articles.title: Connecticut Sun reach deal to sell to Rockets owner for $300 million, move team to Houston in 2027
articles.description:
“This decision has always sat at the ownership level and we worked hard as a front office to make us New England’s WNBA team."

The post Connecticut Sun reach deal to sell to Rockets owner for $300 million, move team to Houston in 2027 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connecticut Sun sold to Rockets owner for $300 million, relocating to Houston in 2027.
WNBA team aimed to represent New England, impacting local sports culture and fan engagement.
Boston residents lose a regional WNBA team, affecting local women's sports support and visibility.
